description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched gable roof with prominent overhangs and exposed rafters, set atop a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a rustic, cabin-like appearance, while the roof is clad in gray shingles. A covered front porch with a peaked roof extends from the main structure, supported by sturdy wooden posts, providing a sheltered entryway. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with several small rectangular openings distributed along the sides and front. The building sits on a slightly raised, grassy plot, with the terrain sloping gently away from the structure. A single chimney protrudes from the roof, indicating the presence of a fireplace or stove inside.
description: A rustic wooden bungalow with a wide gable roof, covered front porch, and log-style exterior walls, set on a grassy plot with a chimney and simple window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, peaked gable roof, and main entrance with supporting wooden posts.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the sloped roof, chimney, and the log wall construction with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the bungalow, the extended roofline, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the porch area, roof overhang, and the transition between the front and side facades.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with small rectangular windows distributed along front and sides
